title: Opila Moa - For The Aether Mod
description: Retextures Black Moa, Pink Moa, or Halcian Pink Moa to look like Opila Bird from Garten of BanBan
body:
# Opila Moa!
This pack retextures either black, pink, or halcian (you choose!) moa to look like Opila Bird from Garten of BanBan

Why?

I thought I was funny, ok?

## You can find me here
